context.projectOverview: Obsidian vault storage layer. Sprints 1-2 DONE: src/vault/{types,frontmatter,note-io}.ts (note model + parse/serialize + read/write/listNotes) and src/vault/{index-map,reindex}.ts (noteToFacts + reindexNotes reconcile-at-ingest, exports SUPERSEDED_STATUS + ReindexSummary). This sprint adds the `bober vault reindex` CLI command: walk a vault dir, parse notes, rebuild the derived FactStore at the team/namespace memory path, print counts. CLI handler never throws (process.exitCode=1 on error), always closes the store.

completedSprints.title: Vault note model + frontmatter round-trip I/O

note: Reuse sprint 1/2 modules + the facts.ts CLI pattern (findProjectRoot, loadConfig, loadTeam->namespace, factsDbPath, ensureFactsDir, store.close in finally, now stamped once at boundary). Extract a testable core (runVaultReindex(projectRoot, opts, deps?)) like runWhoopSync. Register registerVaultCommand in src/cli/index.ts next to registerMedicalCommand. Stay on branch bober/medical-team. Use 'npx vitest run'.
